context: Tests whether the agent uses the lifetimes Python library with BetaGeoFitter and GammaGammaFitter, applies the correct utility function for RFM preparation, filters out zero-frequency customers for the monetary model, uses penalizer_coef=0.001, and applies the correct discount rate and time horizon.

checklist.name: Uses lifetimes library
checklist.description: clv_model.py imports from the lifetimes package (not a different CLV library like pymc-marketing or lifetimes2)

checklist.name: BetaGeoFitter used
checklist.description: clv_model.py instantiates and fits a BetaGeoFitter model (from lifetimes)

checklist.name: GammaGammaFitter used
checklist.description: clv_model.py instantiates and fits a GammaGammaFitter model (from lifetimes)

checklist.name: summary_data_from_transaction_data
checklist.description: clv_model.py uses summary_data_from_transaction_data (from lifetimes.utils) to build the RFM summary, rather than computing recency/frequency/T manually

checklist.name: GGF zero-frequency filter
checklist.description: GammaGammaFitter is fitted only on customers where frequency > 0 (i.e., the rfm dataframe is filtered before fitting GGF)

checklist.name: penalizer_coef=0.001
checklist.description: Both BetaGeoFitter and GammaGammaFitter are initialized with penalizer_coef=0.001

checklist.name: Cancelled orders excluded
checklist.description: Transaction data is filtered to exclude non-completed orders before being passed to the model (e.g., only status='completed' rows are used)

checklist.name: Notes explain GGF filter
checklist.description: model-notes.md explains why customers with zero repeat purchases (frequency=0) are excluded from GammaGammaFitter fitting

checklist.name: Notes state penalizer and discount
checklist.description: model-notes.md states the penalizer_coef value (0.001) AND the monthly discount rate used (0.01)
